subject: Dunsparce — small pale beige serpentine creature with stubby wings and drill tail, grassy open setting
description: A small, pale beige serpentine creature with a rounded face, stubby wings on its sides, and a drill-tipped tail sits in an open grassy or light-colored setting. The creature appears compact and soft-bodied, with simple round eyes. Its expression is blank or mildly surprised. The background is minimal and light-toned, drawing focus to the creature itself.
foreground: small pale beige serpentine creature, stubby wings, drill tail
